overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in wizard robes exploring a snowy gothic castle courtyard. The character exits a building, walks through the snow-covered grounds passing other students and a cat, circles a central fountain with a statue, and traverses covered walkways while snow falls gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle interior corridor transitioning to exterior

events.description: character exits through large wooden doors from indoor corridor to outdoor snowy courtyard
a white and grey cat appears and begins following the character

agents.ego_description: walking out of the castle building through large carved wooden doors into the snowy courtyard

notable_agents.action: cat walking alongside the character into the courtyard
student in dark robes walking ahead through the archway

entered.detail: tall dark wooden doors with carved geometric panels
gothic stone archway marking the exit from the building
massive gnarled tree with snow-covered branches in the courtyard center
tall stone buildings with pointed gothic windows surrounding the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a gothic castle corridor as the character approaches and exits through large wooden doors. Transitioning to the exterior, the scene reveals a snow-covered courtyard with a massive ancient tree in the center. A cat appears and follows the character as they step onto the snowy ground, while another student walks ahead through the stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy courtyard with central tree and scattered students

events.description: character turns right to walk around the large central tree
approaching the central fountain area with ornate stone statue

agents.ego_description: walking through the snowy courtyard, navigating around the central tree and approaching the fountain

notable_agents.action: group of students in dark robes conversing near the tree

entered.detail: large stone fountain with sculpted figures in the courtyard center
tall pointed spires of the castle towers visible above the buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open snowy courtyard, passing stone benches and navigating around the massive central tree. Other students are scattered throughout the area, some walking and others standing in groups. The camera approaches a central stone fountain with an ornate statue, while gothic spires rise in the background against the grey winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard central fountain area with gothic cathedral facade

events.description: character turns left to circle around the fountain and statue
approaching the covered walkway entrance on the left side of the courtyard

agents.ego_description: circling the central stone fountain and statue, examining the detailed gothic architecture

notable_agents.action: group of three students standing and talking near the fountain base

entered.detail: detailed stone sculpture on top of the fountain depicting figures in robes
elaborate stone facade with tall arched windows and carved details
dark arched entrance to a covered stone corridor

segments.scene_description: The character circles the central fountain, providing close-up views of the ornate statue atop it. The gothic cathedral facade dominates the background with its elaborate stonework and tall windows. Other students are seen conversing near the fountain as the character turns left, approaching a covered walkway entrance on the left side while snow continues to fall gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone walkway with ivy-covered walls

events.description: entering the covered stone corridor from the open courtyard
exiting the covered corridor back into the open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly covered stone corridor with ivy growing on the interior walls, then exiting back to the exterior

entered.detail: narrow covered walkway with stone columns and dark shadowed ceiling
stone walls covered in dark green ivy vines

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, covered stone corridor that provides shelter from the snow. The walls are covered in ivy and illuminated by wall-mounted lanterns. After a brief walk through this enclosed space, the character exits back into the open courtyard, where a large stone bridge archway becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard approach to large stone bridge archway

events.description: character turns slightly left toward the stone staircase and archway

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large stone bridge archway in the distance, passing other students

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking ahead toward the archway

entered.detail: massive stone bridge with high arch connecting two castle buildings
snow-covered stone steps leading up to a building entrance
black iron lamp posts with glowing warm light

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking across the snowy courtyard toward an impressive large stone bridge archway that connects two parts of the castle. Stone staircases and ornate lamp posts line the path. Other students are visible walking in the same direction toward the archway, while the gothic architecture frames the scene on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of a gothic castle out into a sprawling, snow-covered courtyard and toward a distant stone bridge. It begins inside a dim corridor, moving through large wooden doors to reveal a wintry exterior where a cat follows the character past a massive ancient tree and other students. As the camera navigates the open grounds, the scene shifts toward a central stone fountain with an ornate statue, framed by towering gothic spires and a grey winter sky. The movement then leads the character into a sheltered, ivy-covered stone corridor illuminated by lanterns before emerging once more into the falling snow. Finally, the path opens up as the camera advances past ornate lamp posts and stone staircases toward a large bridge archway connecting the castle wings.
